explicit_requirements.text: The project list must render every owned project, including a project whose billable_rate is null.
explicit_requirements.source: the list view crashes instead of rendering … Expected: 200, list renders every project (CR-bug-001 REPRO_STEPS + Class)

unknowns.text: How should a null billable_rate display in the project list — blank/placeholder, zero, or the rate field omitted? Baseline is silent on the null-rate case.
unknowns.source: Correct behavior for a null rate is under-specified by baseline (CR-bug-001 Class)
